Our Specialities
Expert care across multiple medical disciplines
🦴

Orthopaedics & Bone Care

Advanced treatment for fractures, joint problems, spine issues, and sports injuries under expert orthopaedic surgeons.

🚑

Trauma & Emergency

24/7 emergency care with rapid response teams, advanced life support, and state-of-the-art trauma management.

🩺

General Medicine

Comprehensive diagnosis and treatment for acute and chronic conditions by experienced general physicians.

💉

Diabetic Care

Specialized management of diabetes, diabetic foot complications, and metabolic disorders with personalized care plans.

🔬

Diagnostic & Radiology

Digital X-ray, laboratory investigations, and advanced diagnostics for accurate and timely diagnosis.

🏥

Surgical Care

Minimally invasive joint surgeries, laparoscopic procedures, and complex surgical interventions with excellent outcomes.

Why Choose RTG Hospital?
Trusted by patients across Chennai and Delhi
🎯

Specialist Expertise

Led by Dr. Karthikeyan Gnanam, renowned orthopaedic surgeon specializing in joint replacement and trauma surgery.

🛡️

Patient Safety First

Wheelchair-accessible facilities at both locations. Full nursing care and attentive staff round the clock.

⚡

Fast Admissions

Average admission in 30 minutes. Quick discharge with minimal hassle for patients and families.

Redhills RTG Hospital is a premier orthopaedic and multispeciality hospital serving Chennai and New Delhi with exceptional care, commitment, and compassion.
